description: Refactor src/scanner/scanner.ts into smaller modules while preserving the public scanCurrentElements() contract.
goal: Split the scanner into focused modules without changing scanCurrentElements() behavior or signature.
requirements: Record current scanner behavior with characterization tests before refactoring
Extract pure utility modules for patterns, deduplication, and comment handling
Extract file discovery into a separate module without changing path or exclude semantics
Extract per-file execution into a structured runner that covers cache, tree-sitter, AST, regex, and error paths
Extract shared progress and cache bookkeeping into runtime helpers
Remove global mutation during scans and build resolved patterns per call
Simplify the Scanner class while preserving export compatibility
Keep parallel and sequential execution paths behaviorally aligned
out_of_scope: Changing the supported language set or exclude defaults
Introducing new scanner features unrelated to modularization
constraints: Use phased plan mode rather than strict mode
Keep exports stable through scanner.ts during extraction
Preserve existing cache, fallback, and progress semantics
Avoid hidden global mutation during a scan

success_criteria.primary: scanCurrentElements() continues to return the same contract while the scanner logic is split into smaller modules
success_criteria.secondary: Characterization coverage exists for discovery, excludes, patterns, dedupe, progress, cache, AST fallback, tree-sitter fallback, and parallel versus sequential parity
